items.title: S01E01 - Bring 'Em Back Alive
items.summary: The new American consul to Singapore asks trapper Frank Buck to search the interior for a missing American agent carrying the Japanese plans for an invasion of the Malay Peninsula.

infolabels.title: Bring 'Em Back Alive
infolabels.plot: The new American consul to Singapore asks trapper Frank Buck to search the interior for a missing American agent carrying the Japanese plans for an invasion of the Malay Peninsula.

items.title: S01E02 - Seven Keys to Singapore
items.summary: Frank tries to free the kidnapped H.H. without sacrificing the Japanese plans for the invasion of Singapore.

infolabels.title: Seven Keys to Singapore
infolabels.plot: Frank tries to free the kidnapped H.H. without sacrificing the Japanese plans for the invasion of Singapore.

items.title: S01E03 - There's One Born Every Minute
items.summary: Frank competes with an old friend and rival to see who can capture a black leopard for an important client, while Gloria tries to recover the stolen jewelry of an important American woman.

infolabels.title: There's One Born Every Minute
infolabels.plot: Frank competes with an old friend and rival to see who can capture a black leopard for an important client, while Gloria tries to recover the stolen jewelry of an important American woman.

items.title: S01E04 - The Reel World of Frank Buck
items.summary: Frank answers a cry for help from a tribe living in a hidden inland valley, whose peace has been disturbed by Nazis mining uranium-bearing ore.

infolabels.title: The Reel World of Frank Buck
infolabels.plot: Frank answers a cry for help from a tribe living in a hidden inland valley, whose peace has been disturbed by Nazis mining uranium-bearing ore.

items.title: S01E05 - The Pied Piper
items.summary: Frank gets involved with a missionary and her young charges when a downed American pilot dies at her mission after passing on information needed in Singapore.

infolabels.title: The Pied Piper
infolabels.plot: Frank gets involved with a missionary and her young charges when a downed American pilot dies at her mission after passing on information needed in Singapore.

items.title: S01E06 - The Warlord
items.summary: Frank and Ali agree to guide Run Run Lee, an arms dealer, to the hidden headquarters of a warlord who claims to be a descendant of a Japanese samurai.

infolabels.title: The Warlord
infolabels.plot: Frank and Ali agree to guide Run Run Lee, an arms dealer, to the hidden headquarters of a warlord who claims to be a descendant of a Japanese samurai.

items.title: S01E07 - Thirty Hours
items.summary: Ali and H.H. must find Frank and Gloria when their plane crashes in the jungle, a plight made more urgent by Frank's desperate need for medical treatment.

infolabels.title: Thirty Hours
infolabels.plot: Ali and H.H. must find Frank and Gloria when their plane crashes in the jungle, a plight made more urgent by Frank's desperate need for medical treatment.

items.title: S01E08 - Wilmer Bass and the Serengeti Kid
items.summary: Frank's old friend Wilmer Bass asks him to take care of the Serengeti Kid, an old show lion who's sporting a golden collar sought by the leader of a dangerous killer cult.

infolabels.title: Wilmer Bass and the Serengeti Kid
infolabels.plot: Frank's old friend Wilmer Bass asks him to take care of the Serengeti Kid, an old show lion who's sporting a golden collar sought by the leader of a dangerous killer cult.

items.title: S01E09 - Escape From Kampoon
items.summary: Frank agrees to help a Nisei intelligence agent on a trip to infiltrate Japanese intelligence and to free a friend trapped in a pseudo prison run to provide slave labor for a local maharajah.

infolabels.title: Escape From Kampoon
infolabels.plot: Frank agrees to help a Nisei intelligence agent on a trip to infiltrate Japanese intelligence and to free a friend trapped in a pseudo prison run to provide slave labor for a local maharajah.

items.title: S01E10 - The Best of Enemies
items.summary: Frank is chained to Bhundi when the wily thief escapes from prison and is trapped into delivering a priceless necklace to two desperate crooks.

infolabels.title: The Best of Enemies
infolabels.plot: Frank is chained to Bhundi when the wily thief escapes from prison and is trapped into delivering a priceless necklace to two desperate crooks.

items.title: S01E11 - To Kill a Princess
items.summary: Frank has to protect an old flame from assassins when she returns from America to claim her father's throne.

infolabels.title: To Kill a Princess
infolabels.plot: Frank has to protect an old flame from assassins when she returns from America to claim her father's throne.

items.title: S01E12 - Bones of Contention
items.summary: Frank, H.H., and a pretty archaeologist desired by them both go in search of a skeleton believed to an ancient species of man.

infolabels.title: Bones of Contention
infolabels.plot: Frank, H.H., and a pretty archaeologist desired by them both go in search of a skeleton believed to an ancient species of man.

items.title: S01E13 - A Switch in Time
items.summary: Gloria asks Frank to guide an American agent into the interior, unaware at first that the man is General MacArthur and he's seeking the defense plans for the Malay peninsula.

infolabels.title: A Switch in Time
infolabels.plot: Gloria asks Frank to guide an American agent into the interior, unaware at first that the man is General MacArthur and he's seeking the defense plans for the Malay peninsula.

items.title: S01E14 - The Shadow Women of Chung Tai
items.summary: An old girlfriend of Frank's is kidnapped by a white slavery ring.

infolabels.title: The Shadow Women of Chung Tai
infolabels.plot: An old girlfriend of Frank's is kidnapped by a white slavery ring.

items.title: S01E15 - The Hostage
items.summary: Frank and H.H. stumble upon a Chinese triad that is planning to assassinate the Governor-General.

infolabels.title: The Hostage
infolabels.plot: Frank and H.H. stumble upon a Chinese triad that is planning to assassinate the Governor-General.

items.title: S01E16 - Dead Run
items.summary: Frank and a lady photographer are captured by a fierce tribe ruled by an escaped convict, who gives them one chance to outrun the tribe's hunters.

infolabels.title: Dead Run
infolabels.plot: Frank and a lady photographer are captured by a fierce tribe ruled by an escaped convict, who gives them one chance to outrun the tribe's hunters.

items.title: S01E17 - Storm Warning
items.summary: Frank travels with a shipload of suspects when a series of nearly fatal accidents begin to plague him.

infolabels.title: Storm Warning
infolabels.plot: Frank travels with a shipload of suspects when a series of nearly fatal accidents begin to plague him.
